theme_and_archetype.reasoning: Patients/diners need warmth, calm, trust. Organic palette fits the 'comfort food that feels like home' narrative perfectly. Highlighting warm saffron (spices), cream (dosa/batter), and dark green (banana leaf).

hierarchy.labels: text-xs sm:text-sm uppercase tracking-[0.2em] font-medium text-accent

grid_strategy.description: Mode A (Tetris Grid) for marketing visual impact. Avoid standard symmetrical columns everywhere. Mix large hero spans with smaller supporting blocks.

sections_and_components.name: Sticky Nav
sections_and_components.instructions: Use 'glass_header' surface styling. Logo on left (Playfair Display, bold, primary color). Links centered, hidden on mobile behind hamburger. Primary CTA 'Reservation' on right. Must sit above all content (z-50). Add pt-[100px] to main wrapper.

sections_and_components.name: Hero Section
sections_and_components.instructions: Content on left, dynamic overlapping imagery on right. Headline in Playfair Display. Use accent color overlines. Two CTAs ('View Menu' solid primary, 'Visit Us Today' outline accent). Right side should have the main hero image (dosa) breaking out of its container slightly to feel organic.

sections_and_components.name: About/Story
sections_and_components.instructions: Generous spacing. Large expressive typography. Interplay between text and a secondary image (restaurant interior). Quote block 'Comfort food that feels like home' using italicized serif.

sections_and_components.name: Menu/Services Highlights
sections_and_components.instructions: Use Mode A 'Tetris' grid. Show categories: Breakfast Specials, South Indian, North Indian, Snacks. Use large luscious images as backgrounds for the cards with gradient overlays (black/40 to transparent) so text is readable.

sections_and_components.name: Why Choose Us
sections_and_components.instructions: Clean icons (Lucide React - star, heart, wallet, map-pin). Cardless UI. Use generous spacing (gap-12). Text aligned left. Soft accent color circles behind icons.

sections_and_components.name: Customer Reviews
sections_and_components.instructions: Use Framer Motion or Swiper. Soft cards (bg-white) resting on the primary cream background. Include star ratings. High contrast text.

sections_and_components.name: Location & Final CTA
sections_and_components.instructions: Massive typography for CTA: 'Hungry? Visit Us Today!'. Deep green (#2F5D50) background for this block, cream (#FFF6E9) text. Clean embedded map block or stylized address card. Footer links below.

images.description: Indian thali with assorted foods on metal tray
Warm dim restaurant interior table setting

critical_rules: Use standard Tailwind HTML (div, section) for layouts, avoid strict Shadcn container elements for marketing sections to allow fluid overlaps.
Do NOT use pure black. Use #2B2B2B for darkest text.
Do NOT center align text in paragraphs; left-align for readability.
Apply 'data-testid' to all interactive elements (buttons, nav links, form inputs) using kebab-case role-based names.
